title: Suki Baby Medium Zooma Soft Boa Plush Toy with Embroidered Accents (Zebra),Grey,white,Medium (Pack of 1)
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Suki Baby Zooma Zebra medium cuddly toy
Soft boa plush with embroidered accents
Zebra print in soft grey and white
description: Product Description Beautiful supersoft plush Zooma Zebra medium Babys cuddly toy from Suki Gifts Baby collection. Premium quality animal style print soft boa plush Zebra in two colour soft grey and white, with embroidered accents to the face. Approximately 7 inches (17.8 cm) tall. Suitable for Newborns+. Other items also available in the Bing Bing Giraffe and Zooma Zebra range. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Safety Warning Remove all tags before giving to children Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby Zooma Zebra soft boa plush medium Zebra toy See more
